generated_description: An adversary established persistence by creating or modifying a Windows service, which then executed an obfuscated PowerShell command. This PowerShell script attempted to disable PowerShell script block logging and AMSI, likely to evade detection. Subsequently, the script downloaded and executed additional content from a remote server, using an obfuscated user-agent and proxy settings, indicating command and control activity. The adversary also performed system information discovery by executing `whoami.exe` and staged a credential database by copying registry hive files to disk.
